title: psychotria kurzii
intro: Psychotria kurzii, also known as the Thai bitters or Kurz's Psychotria, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria kurzii include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
